name: Looker
description: Sync Looks and Dashboards from your Google Looker (BI / data exploration platform) instance into the Shielva knowledge base using the Looker REST API 4.0.

install_fields.label: Looker Instance URL (e.g. https://mycompany.looker.com:19999)
install_fields.help: The base URL of your Looker instance including port 19999 (e.g. https://mycompany.looker.com:19999).

install_fields.label: API Client ID
install_fields.help: The API3 Client ID from Looker Admin → Users → Edit User → API3 Keys.

install_fields.label: API Client Secret
install_fields.help: The API3 Client Secret paired with the Client ID. Only shown once at key creation time.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate that base_url, client_id, and client_secret are present.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Login via client credentials and call /user to confirm identity, returning HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Content
methods.description: Login then fetch Looks and Dashboards; normalize each to ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: Get Look
methods.description: Return a single Look by ID. Raises LookerNotFoundError if not found.

methods.name: Get Dashboard
methods.description: Return a single dashboard by ID. Raises LookerNotFoundError if not found.

methods.name: Run Look
methods.description: Execute a Look and return its data in the specified format.
